channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzanian Mine Workers Report Labor Rights Violations and Unsafe Conditions at Chinese-Owned Site
item.description: Workers at Tianpin Investment Management Ltd, a Chinese-owned gold mine in Kahama District, Tanzania, have accused the company of labor rights violations and unsafe working conditions. The complaints ...

item.title: US military escalates tensions with Iran as Trump reverses Hormuz fee plan
item.description: The US has intensified military operations against Iran following President Donald Trump's abrupt reversal of a proposed 20 per cent levy on cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz. The decision co...

item.title: Spain takes 1-0 halftime lead over France after Oyarzabal penalty
item.description: In a thrilling FIFA World Cup 2026 clash, Spain secured a 1-0 half-time lead over France after a crucial penalty awarded to them. The match, played on Tuesday, July 14, 2026, saw Spain forward Lamine ...

item.title: Lagos police dismantle car fraud syndicate, recover stolen vehicles
item.description: The Lagos State Police Command has successfully dismantled a car fraud syndicate and recovered stolen vehicles, urging dealers to exercise caution. The operation targeted individuals involved in illeg...

item.title: Folarin Balogun addresses FIFA ban overturn controversy after long silence
item.description: Folarin Balogun, a Nigerian footballer who was previously banned by FIFA for alleged violations of the organization's regulations, has finally spoken publicly about the recent decision to overturn his...

item.title: Alberta's emissions intensity drops 28% since 2012, according to new report
item.description: A new Alberta government report reveals that emissions intensity from the oil sands has decreased by 28% since 2012, marking significant progress in reducing environmental impact. The study, which ana...

item.title: News Corp Australia Blocks Crawler Bots: Steps to Resolve Access Issues
item.description: News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage traffic from crawler bots on its websites. If you encounter a block message and are not a bot, follow these steps: disable AdBlockers/pop-up bloc...

item.title: Impeachment Trial Updates: Prosecution Adds Witnesses to Address Alleged Threats Against Sara Duterte
item.description: The impeachment trial against Vice President Sara Duterte is gaining momentum as prosecution teams plan to add more witnesses to address allegations of her allegedly orchestrating the killing of Presi...

item.title: Appeal Court Delays Ruling on Deregistration of ADC and Other Political Parties
item.description: The Court of Appeal in Abuja has postponed its decision on appeals seeking to overturn the Federal High Court's order to deregister the African Democratic Congress (ADC) and four other political parti...

item.title: Societal Trends and Psychological Fears Driving Anti-Ageing Movements
item.description: The article explores the growing societal obsession with anti-ageing, linking it to broader anxieties about mortality, environmental crises, and social instability. Researchers initially faced ridicul...

item.title: Microsoft Releases Windows 10 KB5099539 Extended Security Update with 570 Vulnerability Fixes
item.description: Microsoft has released the Windows 10 KB5099539 extended security update, which includes the July 2026 Patch Tuesday security updates addressing 570 vulnerabilities, along with additional security fix...

item.title: Colombian Father Killed in Maine ICE Shooting
item.description: Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero, a 26-year-old Colombian father, was killed in a shooting incident involving an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officer in Biddeford, Maine, on July 14, 2026. ...

item.title: ED probes BJP leader in money laundering case linked to illegal betting app
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has launched a probe against Vikas Garg, a BJP leader and convenor of the party's economic cell in Delhi, for his alleged involvement in a money laundering case tied t...

item.title: Trump to address election claims and intelligence officials in Thursday speech
item.description: President Donald Trump is set to deliver a primetime speech on Thursday, during which he will reiterate his unsupported claims of election fraud from the 2020 election, which he lost to Joe Biden. The...

item.title: US Government Refunds Billion Dollars in Illegal Tariffs
item.description: The United States government has been compelled to reimburse companies that suffered financial losses due to Donald Trump's controversial 'liberation day' tariffs. Following a landmark Supreme Court r...

item.title: Microsoft Enhances Windows Search by Removing Promotional Content and Improving Usability
item.description: Microsoft has addressed long-standing issues with the Windows 11 search functionality by overhauling the search box to prioritize user needs over promotional content. The update, rolling out to Window...

item.title: Defense Questions NBI Witness Credibility in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: During the fifth day of Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, her legal team intensified efforts to challenge the credibility of a National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) witness. The defense argued that t...

item.title: Medicine Hat Regional Park to Stay Closed After Drowning Incident
item.description: The Medicine Hat Regional Park in Alberta will remain closed for the season following a drowning incident that occurred earlier this year. The decision comes after a thorough safety assessment by loca...

item.title: Judge Criticizes DOJ Official Todd Blanche Ahead of Confirmation Hearing
item.description: U.S. District Judge Kathleen Williams ruled that former President Donald Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was invalid, as it amounted to suing his own government. This decision followed a Supreme Court...

item.title: Commuters Opt for Slightly Pricier Rides for Improved Experience Despite Affordability Concerns
item.description: A new analysis of Bolt's trip data reveals that while affordability remains the primary factor influencing ride choices in South Africa, there is a growing trend among commuters to pay a marginal prem...
